subject: Include in ODLSLI docker SDNR/OOF/PCI/ANR POC Feature
commit_message:
Include in ODLSLI docker SDNR/OOF/PCI/ANR POC Feature

Changes to Dockerfile and ODLSLI POM file

Change-Id: Ib555c35bdf86fcc521a640b609ffa6178bfdf235
Issue-ID: CCSDK-1205
Signed-off-by: SandeepLinux <sandeep.shah2@techmahindra.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-distribution-master-verify-java/241/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.ccsdk.features.sdnr.northbound:sdnr-northbound-features-installer:zip:repo:0.4.2-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.ccsdk.distribution:distribution-odlsli-alpine:pom:0.4.2-SNAPSHOT: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.onap.ccsdk.features.sdnr.northbound:sdnr-northbound-features-installer:zip:repo:0.4.2-SNAPSHOT, org.onap.ccsdk.features.sdnr.northbound:oofpcipoc-installer:zip:repo:0.4.2-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-distribution-master-verify-java/241/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-distribution-master-verify-java/241

Patch Set 1:

The build failed because it could not locate the artifact associated with new SDNR OOF PCI POC feature ( org.onap.ccsdk.features.sdnr.northbound:sdnr-northbound-features-installer:zip:repo:0.4.2-SNAPSHOT) that was committed for issue iD: CCSDK-1203.

Patch Set 2:

Not sure why service logic related files were also pushed for gerrit review under the same Change ID. The additional files relate to DG's, templates, property files to support service logic for SDNR OOF
PCI POC use case. Also includes the required changes to POM files to
appropriately copy the above artifacts to docker-state folder in 
respective sub-folders. This was for CCSDK-1204, and were committed under that issue. Sorry about that....hope you can pick up/merge these files as well...Thank you.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-2

SDN-R features should not be installed in the odlsli image.  Doing so could negatively impact APP-C, which I do not believe is tracking SDN-R as an impact for Dublin.

Please add these to the sdnc image in sdnc/oam/installation/sdnc.

Abandoned

Abandoning in response to feedback from Dan...WIll replace this with appropriate code commits
